name: Vegetarian Gravy
recipeIngredient: or from pinto or adzuki beans
2 tablespoons Tamari soy sauce, up to 3 tablespoons
1/3 cup Whole wheat flour, or millet flour or quinoa flour
1/4 teaspoon Chili powder, up to 1/2 teaspoon
recipeInstructions:
1. Use previously frozen bean "juice" or cook 1/2-1 lb beans until very tender and drain off the liquid, saving about 2 cups.
2. Use the thickest part of the liquid for this recipe. Use the remaining beans in another recipe or freeze them for later use.
3. Combine all ingredients with cooled bean juice and stir over medium-low heat until thickened.
4. Mix well using a wire whisk or blender.
5. Correct seasonings to taste and serve the gravy over potatoes, rice, whole grains, vegetables, mock meat loaf, burgers, or other dishes.
Makes: 2 1/2 cups
